title: Mount Opacity
description: Allows setting custom opacity (transparency) for entities that you are riding, making it easier to see what's in front or below you!
body: # Mount Opacity Allows setting custom opacity (transparency) for entities that you are riding. This only affects the entity that you, the player, are riding, and not all entities or entities ridden by other players. Each supported entity can have its opacity individually configured from 0% to 100%. Useful for mounts that take up a lot of your screen! ## Supported Entities - Horse - Pig - Llama - Strider - Camel - Nautilus - Happy Ghast
